prompt:
SocialZone prod gate (Sid). Host https://nakama-rest.intelli-verse-x.ai. Device 0019ebcad32cf08adf81bc51d92254c0. GameId 126bf539-dae2-4bcf-964d-316c0fa1f92b. Auth with server key defaultkey. With ?unwrap send JSON object body (not double-encoded string).

Each tick:
1) gh run list -R intelli-verse-x/nakama --workflow "deploy-eks.yml" --limit 3 — note latest master push conclusion.
2) Retest as Sid: GET /v2/friend; RPC ivx_social_friends_list; ivx_social_friend_search query=Bear; ivx_social_friend_nearby; ivx_social_group_search query=Intelli.
3) PASS only if friends_list count>0 AND Bear search shows relationshipStatus=friend (or equivalent friend state). Otherwise FAIL with one-line delta vs prior tick.
4) If PASS: stop this loop (kill AGENT_LOOP_TICK_socialzone_deploy PID) and report green. If FAIL because undeployed local fixes (friends SQL fallback / smoke-test mirror.gcr), do NOT edit .github — say push+deploy still required. Keep replies to a short table.
